// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly;

/// <summary>
/// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
/// </summary>
public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Registers all default services.
    /// </summary>
    public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssemblyServices(this IServiceCollection services)
    {
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.MultiInterfaceService, global::TestNamespace.MultiInterfaceService>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IFirst, global::TestNamespace.MultiInterfaceService>();
        services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.ISecond, global::TestNamespace.MultiInterfaceService>();

        return services;
    }
}
